titleStmt.title: SII 15.203: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 203. (B.K. No. 81 of 1928-29.) KŌḶŪR, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the temple of Komārēśvara.
This is dated Śaka 1229, Plavaṅga, Vaiśākha śu. 10, Thursday, corresponding to 1307 A.D., April 13.
It refers to the maintenance of the gift of land made earlier to the god Guṇḍanātha of Bidure. The inscription is partly worn out and appears to be incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷa
prauḍha pratāpa cakravarti śrīrāmacaṁdravijeya
rāya rājyōdeyada sakavarṣa 1229 na pra(pla)vaṁga saṁ
vatsarada vaiśākha suddha 10 mi guruvāra daṁdu
bidureyali guṁḍanātha dēvariṁge hālumaṁḍaga
12 ḍu mattaru pūrvvavādiyāgi biṭaṁtaha keI
yyanu taṁmma sajjeyaliṁga śrīguṁḍanāthaṁge ballarsu
sarvvanamasyavāgi pālisutiddaru Avaru niṁdu
keṁcarsariṁge paṭṭavādalli vūriṁge pāḷeyava
bēḍivaṁmma Eṁmmeya koḷakoṁḍaru Eṁdaḍe keṁcarsa
ralliṁge hōgi niṁmma bidureya śrīguṁḍanāthadē
vara kaygeniṁmma māṁnyakāṟaru pāḷeyava bēḍu
tidāru muṁna ballarsaru maṁnisuva dha
rmmavanu kaḍsuvudē niṁma sajjeyaliṁgaThe record stops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 15.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
